sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55296" key="katasto/resis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-στόρεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n55296.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">layering</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμπέλων</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
